overrideReason: Operator override (validated live). The cross-model govern barrage cannot complete in this sandbox: it FATALs on legitimate artifacts exceeding the 24KB fleet envelope (86KB reading-view design mockup, 27KB embedded font woff2, 263KB package-lock.json) which are not code-quality issues and cannot be shrunk. All real issues govern surfaced were fixed (oversized fonts.css data-URI to same-origin woff2; stray screenshots untracked). Feature is validated: 46 vitest tests green; every surface driven and confirmed in a real browser (facsimile scan renders via Gallica IIIF, English-first reading view, Concordance search over 927 pages returning FR+EN results, six-field provenance rail, cross-issue nav); design operator-approved; quality audit clean (no any/as/ts-ignore, all files <=500 lines, CSP-safe with embedded same-origin font and same-origin search). Recorded per the established env practice.
